segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Are you still working on that project for your ecology class? Yes. but I'm almost finished. I just have to present my findings to the class next week. I see. Well, I'm glad I'm not in your shoes. Talking in front of people makes me nervous really. I had an internship as a tour guide at Dawson State Park last summer, so I think I can handle this. Oh, okay. Speaking of internships, I'm still waiting to hear back from the history museum downtown. I set my application in last month, but I still haven't heard anything.
